description_long: This object consists of a stack of rectangular concrete cinder blocks arranged on a wooden pallet. The blocks are hollow with two or three large rectangular voids running through each, typical of construction cinder blocks. Some blocks are neatly stacked, while a few are scattered or tilted, suggesting recent movement or partial use. The surface of the blocks is rough and unfinished, with visible seams and minor chips, and the color is a light gray with some darker weathering marks. The wooden pallet beneath is aged, with visible slats and some discoloration from use. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, industrial object commonly found at construction sites or in urban infrastructure storage areas.
description: A stack of light gray concrete cinder blocks with hollow centers, arranged on a weathered wooden pallet. Some blocks are scattered or tilted, giving a used, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main face of the stacked cinder blocks, with several blocks neatly aligned and a few scattered on the left side atop the pallet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stack and the alignment of the blocks, with the wooden pallet clearly visible beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the stack, with more scattered blocks on the right and the block arrangement less uniform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the scattered blocks and the end of the pallet, with the block voids and rough surfaces visible.
attribute_location_context: urban construction site or roadside storage area
attribute_weathering_pattern: Minor chipping and dark weathering marks are visible on some block edges, with slight discoloration on the pallet slats.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: stacked together on a pallet, not integrated with other structures
